visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair and makeup is shown in a medium shot. She is wearing a grey top. In front of her is a box of Korean fried chicken, a container of rice, and a bowl of kimchi. She picks up a piece of chicken with chopsticks and eats it with an expressive facial expression. (2) The scene shifts to a close-up of her adding rice to her meal. She gives a thumbs up. (3) She shows a bottle of Buldak sauce and pours it onto a piece of chicken. (4) She combines chicken, rice, and kimchi on a spoon and eats it. (5) She shows a can of sesame oil and pours it onto the kimchi. (6) She continues eating various combinations of chicken, rice, and oiled kimchi with high energy and exaggerated chewing movements.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 只有韓國人才會這樣吃炸雞? How Koreans Eat Chicken. [Logo]: @602avenue. [Subtitle]: 頂級洋釀炸雞. (2) [Subtitle]: 1. 配白飯. (3) [Subtitle]: 2. 白飯+Kimchi. (4) [Subtitle]: 3. 火辣雞醬. (5) [Subtitle]: 韓國人真的會這樣吃!. (6) [Subtitle]: 也太好吃了吧. (7) [Subtitle]: 火辣雞醬 +1. (8) [Subtitle]: (我的專屬吃法).

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Female with long dark hair, wearing a grey long-sleeved shirt, well-applied makeup.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background is a neutral-colored wall, possibly in a living room or dining area.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with loud, crisp chewing and crunching sounds (ASMR style), emphasizing the texture of the food. A bright, upbeat synthesized BGM plays in the background. (2) A sharp click or thud sound as chopsticks hit the container triggers a new phase. Chewing sounds continue with high intensity. (3) A glug or liquid pouring sound is heard as sauce is added. The chewing resumes with a squelchy, wet texture mixed with the crunch. (4) A metallic clink of a spoon hitting the bowl occurs. More intense crunching. (5) Towards the end, a female voice speaks in Korean with a high-pitched, excited tone, expressing enjoyment. The BGM remains consistent.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Step-by-step Demonstration -> Satisfaction Reveal
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to demonstrate a specific Korean way of eating fried chicken (combining it with rice, kimchi, and hot sauce) while providing an ASMR experience with exaggerated eating sounds to evoke appetite and engagement.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear branding on the chicken box and the use of specific branded sauces.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video focuses heavily on the sensory aspect of eating, using high-quality ASMR audio and fast-paced visual editing to maintain viewer interest.
